artifacts.description: Three-panel descriptive view of DepMap dependency, same-source cBioPortal tumor/normal expression, and GTEx normal-tissue median TPM.

exclusionRules: Duplicate model_id, sample_id, or tissue_id values are fatal input errors.
Non-numeric non-empty measurement values are fatal input errors.
Missing measurements are retained in denominators and reported as missingness.
Missing DepMap lineage is labeled Unknown; lineage series require at least 5 observed gene-effect values.
Unrecognized cBioPortal sample types remain unknown and are excluded from tumor and normal summaries.
No inferential statistical test and no cross-source tumor-versus-normal comparison is performed.
lockedAnalysis.normalTissueStatistic: GTEx V8 tissue median TPM; descriptive screening flag only
lockedAnalysis.tumorStatistic: median and interquartile range, tumor and normal separately

dependency.fraction_at_or_below_locked_c.note: Descriptive selectivity readout only; not evidence that an essential target should be drugged.

dependency.median_by_lineage.note: Lineages shown only when observed N >= 5.

dependency.median_gene_effect.note: Orthogonal tumor-biology context; dependency alone does not establish ADC suitability.

dependency.models_at_or_below_locked_cut.note: Count uses the reviewed cutoff and includes no model-selected threshold.

normal_tissue.maximum_tissue_median_tpm.note: Descriptive screening maximum only; flags potential normal-tissue exposure risk requiring protein-level and clinical confirmation.

normal_tissue.median_tpm_by_tissue.note: Flags potential normal-tissue exposure risk requiring protein-level and clinical confirmation. This result is not quantitatively compared with the cBioPortal cohort.

groups.label: Normal
groups.note: No observed normal expression values were present in this cBioPortal slice.

tumor_expression.median_by_sample_class.note: Tumor and normal are same-study, same-profile summaries. No quantitative comparison to GTEx is made. Null normal values mean the selected cBioPortal slice contains no normal observations.

groups.label: Normal
groups.note: No observed normal expression values were present in this cBioPortal slice.

tumor_expression.q1_by_sample_class.note: Tumor and normal are same-study, same-profile summaries. No quantitative comparison to GTEx is made. Null normal values mean the selected cBioPortal slice contains no normal observations.

groups.label: Normal
groups.note: No observed normal expression values were present in this cBioPortal slice.
